descFull: Ghost Eye Informationgathering Footprinting Scanner and Recon Tool Release. Ghost Eye is an Information Gathering Tool I made in python 3. To run Ghost Eye, it only needs a domain or ip. Ghost Eye can work with any Linux distros if they support Python 3. Author: Jolanda de Koff
